summary: Phase 2 & 3 features testing complete: DocuSign MOCK Integration, Digital Onboarding (7-section fact-find), MFA with TOTP, Security Settings page. All backend APIs pass (12/12). Fixed MongoDB duplicate key error in e-signature endpoint. All frontend features working correctly.

fixed.issue: MongoDB duplicate key error due to _id: None in insert_one
fixed.fix: Removed _id: None from insert_one call in server.py line 3475

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test data created for factfind (test_client_001), e-signature requests, and MFA settings (test_user_mfa_001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 & 3 features fully tested and working: DocuSign MOCK (send/sign/view requests), Digital Onboarding with 7 fact-find sections, MFA with TOTP setup/verify/disable, Security Settings with Password/Sessions/Activity tabs. All backend data is MOCKED. Demo account login works via 'Try Demo Account' button. Compliance modal must be dismissed first.

features: Send for Signature dialog with document/client selection
Signature requests list with Pending/Completed/Expired status
Sign Now button for pending requests
Mock signing interface with document preview
7 fact-find sections: Personal Details, Employment & Income, Assets, Liabilities, Insurance & Estate, Goals & Objectives, Risk Profile
Risk Profile Assessment with investment questions
Two-Factor Auth tab with Enable 2FA button
MFA setup dialog with mock QR code
Sessions tab (active sessions list with Revoke)
